extensionDescription.message: Select text on any page and instantly ask an AI model for an explanation or translation.

extensionToggleDescription.message: Control text selection features on web pages

darkModeDescription.message: Use a dark appearance for answer panels

superModeDescription.message: Block page button and link actions, and allow text selection inside buttons, links, and text fields

quickModeDescription.message: Only send the current paragraph and selection; answers may be less accurate

usagePartialDescription.message: $1 requests did not report usage; tokens were not estimated.

settingsTagline.message: A more convenient way to use AI on the web

uiLanguageHelp.message: Controls the settings page, popup, Ask Chat panel, and default answer language

remoteUrlHelp.message: Remote URLs must use HTTPS. localhost, 127.0.0.1, and ::1 may use HTTP.

apiKeyHelp.message: Stored only on this device. Optional for local loopback services.

modelsHelp.message: Enter one model name per line.

customInstructionsHelp.message: Appended to every explanation and translation request

customInstructionsPlaceholder.message: Example: Start with the answer, then explain in 3 bullets; keep technical terms when translating.

triggerPositionHelp.message: Choose where the trigger appears relative to selected text.

shortcutIntro.message: Click a key field, then press a new single key or combination. Shortcuts work after text is selected and the trigger appears.

askShortcutDescription.message: Same as clicking the Ask Chat button

shortcutConflict.message: The two actions cannot use the same shortcut. Change one of them.

configurationBackupDescription.message: Save model services, interface preferences, and extension settings as JSON, then restore them on another device. Exports also include this device's usage statistics; API Keys are included only when you export manually.

exportSecurityWarning.message: The exported file contains API Keys. Store it securely and do not share it.

privacyDescription.message: When you request an explanation or translation, the selection, relevant page context, page title and URL, and follow-up question are sent to your configured model service. Quick mode sends only the current paragraph and selection. AskInPage's developer does not receive or store this content.

privacyApiKey.message: API Keys are stored only in local extension storage and are not browser-synced.

shortcutSaveFailed.message: Could not save: Translate and Ask Chat cannot use the same shortcut

invalidImport.message: Import failed: choose a valid AskInPage JSON configuration

apiUrlInvalid.message: The model service URL is invalid

apiUrlHttpsRequired.message: Remote model services must use HTTPS; only local loopback URLs may use HTTP

apiUrlUnsupportedProtocol.message: Model service URLs support HTTPS, or HTTP for local loopback addresses

thinking7.message: Finding a path through vector space

error_model_request_failed.message: The model request failed. Please try again.

error_api_key_missing.message: Add an API Key in extension settings first.

error_network_error.message: A network error occurred. Check the service URL and your connection.

error_request_timeout.message: Model generation timed out. Try again or select less text.

error_request_idle_timeout.message: The model stopped responding. Try again or switch models.

error_empty_model_response.message: The model returned no content. Try again or switch models.

error_stream_unavailable.message: The model did not return a readable response stream.

error_extension_reloaded.message: The extension was reloaded. Refresh this page and try again.

contextInsideButton.message: Inside a button or clickable control
